nasb.text: Whatever you devise against the Lord, He will make a complete end of it. Distress will not rise up twice.

esv.text: What do you plot against the Lord? He will make a complete end; trouble will not rise up a second time.

cnv.text: 尼尼微人哪， 你們對耶和華還有甚麼企圖？ 他必盡行毀滅； 患難必不再次來臨。

ccb.text: 尼尼微人啊， 你们为何图谋抵挡耶和华？ 祂要彻底毁灭你们， 无需击打两次。
